projectDescription: AI-powered Git commit message generator that analyzes your changes and whispers the perfect commit message using multiple AI models.
keyFeatures: AI-powered commit message generation using multiple AI models (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, and more)
Interactive commit confirmation with review, edit, retry, and model-switching options
Code analysis for staged and unstaged changes with AI-powered suggestions
Multi-language support for commit messages in 20+ languages
Conventional commit format with customizable emoji support
Ticket/prefix integration for project management workflows
Free model option requiring no API key
Editor integrations for VS Code and JetBrains IDEs
Configurable defaults and flexible API key management
publicApiSurface: gitwhisper commit - Generate and apply commit messages with interactive confirmation
gitwhisper analyze - Analyze code changes with AI-powered suggestions
gitwhisper list-models - Display all supported AI models
gitwhisper list-variants - Show available variants for AI models
gitwhisper save-key - Store API keys securely for future use
gitwhisper set-defaults - Configure default model, variant, and settings
gitwhisper show-defaults - Display current default configuration
gitwhisper clear-defaults - Clear saved default preferences
gitwhisper show-config - View full configuration file
gitwhisper change-language - Set language for commit messages
gitwhisper always-add - Configure automatic staging of changes
gitwhisper update - Update GitWhisper to the latest version
gw - Short alias for gitwhisper command
